channel.title: CTF on ByteMe: Veronika's Coding After Dark
channel.description: Recent content in CTF on ByteMe: Veronika's Coding After Dark

item.title: NorthSec 2023: A Novice's Journey into Cybersecurity
item.description: NorthSec 2023: A Novice’s Journey into Cybersecurity What is NorthSec? NorthSec is Canada’s premier applied security event, designed to elevate the knowledge and technical expertise of professionals and students in the field of cybersecurity. The event comprises a two-day conference featuring presentations by industry experts, followed by an intense 48-hour on-site Capture The Flag (CTF) contest. My First CTF Experience Okay, where do I start?! As a team of students with minimal preparation, we plunged headfirst into our first CTF at NorthSec 2023.
